title: The Beginning of Beginning

[]: The Beginning of Beginning             Quote Post by Stuart » Thu Jun 26, 2014 6:20 am Hello All, I haven't posted here for years but I have read a few threads now and again and have very much been enjoying Rebuild. So hello again everyone :) I saw this video on youtube and had a good old google to search for any more information or a translation to no avail. Has anyone seen this and knows of a source and/or translation? It's a 15 minute film in Japanese that appears to be explaining the origins of Adam and Lilith. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HtkDP_FTz90
